title: Dynamic Crops
body:
![Dynamic Crops Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/735c3ed10c682324716cf896d42a24eb52c54a6c.png)

Are those crops getting too boring? Well, Dynamic crops allow them to spread!

When existing crops attempt to grow they will also check adjacent blocks for dirt and attempt to convert it to farmland. Once there is farmland the crops will also attempt to spread themselves across the farmland. Everything is configurable to allow maximum customization and tuning for performance seekers.

 
--Notes/FAQ--

If your game is crashing after updating the mod, delete your old config file and try again before commenting.

 

-- Planned features --
(Some features have now been added)

CONFIG! Configure everything!

Spread to only touching blocks. (Front, back, left, right, up, down) (Now currently used)
Spread to blocks in 3,3,3 areas (This feature will be re-added in the next version)

Crops wars (Most likely disabled by default) Crops of different types (EG Potatoes and carrots) Will try to destroy each other's crops before spreading. (This will be fun with season mods)

Fabric, maybe?

-- Credits --
Developer - dimondking
Logo/Graphic design - ItsMelody
